_publications._publicationTitle: Optical coherence tomography of the macular ganglion cell layer in children with neurofibromatosis type 1 is a useful tool in the assessment for optic pathway gliomas.

_contextSnippet: Pairwise contrast tests showed thinner OCT measurements (GC-IPL and pRNFL; p<0.001)...GC-IPL 85 ± 0.4 (84–85) N = 103 vs 70 ± 0.7 (68–70) N = 22
resourceName: Cirrus HD-OCT device (Cirrus; Carl Zeiss Meditec, Dublin, CA, USA)
details: GC-IPL measurements showed thinner values in NF1-OPG eyes (70 ± 0.7 μm) compared to NF1 noOPG eyes (85 ± 0.4 μm) with p<0.001, demonstrating ability to distinguish between groups
